💎
Jewellery

Morgan's Emerald

Handmade bohemian jewellery & accessories

📍 Cashel Market 📍 Keel Market

About Morgan's Emerald

Morgan's Emerald is one of the most eye-catching stalls at Achill Island Market. The display is a feast of colour and mystique — handmade bohemian jewellery that blends spiritual symbolism with contemporary style.

Every piece is handcrafted with care. From evil eye charms that have been worn for centuries as protection talismans, to delicate hamsa hand pendants, natural stone bracelets, and unique boho accessories — there's something for everyone at this stall.

Whether you're treating yourself or looking for a meaningful gift, Morgan's Emerald offers jewellery that tells a story. The stall has become a firm favourite with visitors to the market, and you'll often find people spending time browsing the full collection.

What You'll Find

🧿 Evil Eye Charms

Traditional evil eye jewellery — bracelets, necklaces and earrings with protective symbolism.

🤲 Hamsa Hand Pieces

Beautiful hamsa hand pendants and charms — a symbol of protection and good fortune.

💎 Natural Stones

Natural stone bracelets and necklaces — amethyst, rose quartz, turquoise and more.

🌸 Boho Accessories

Unique bohemian accessories and statement pieces that stand out from the ordinary.
